name: Crockpot Corn and Lentil Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 1 1/2 pounds boneless and skinless chicken thighs in a crockpot.
2. Add 1 1/2 cups lentils, 1 large chopped onion, 3 sliced celery ribs, 2 tablespoons tomato paste, 1 teaspoon turmeric, 3/4 teaspoon cinnamon, and 7 cups chicken broth to the pot.
3. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
4. Cook for 3 to 5 hours on high or 7 to 9 hours on low until the chicken thighs are tender.
5. Remove the cooked chicken thighs and cut them into bite-sized pieces.
6. Return the meat to the pot.
7. Add 1 cup cooked corn kernels, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, salt, and pepper to taste.
8. Stir well to incorporate all ingredients.
9. Serve hot. Makes 8 servings.
